hero.title: Our standard product catalogue
hero.subtitle: Our in-stock, quickly deliverable standard parts for three sectors. Please contact us for the detailed catalogue.

products.notice: Our full catalogue will be added as part of Plan 3 — we currently accept requests via the contact form.

hero.title: From Bursa to the world since 1989
hero.subtitle: Kıta Plastik ve Tekstil has been in plastic injection moulding for 36 years, backed by three generations of engineering know-how.

story.title: Our story
story.body: We were founded in 1989 as a small workshop in Bursa. In our early years we produced machine parts for the textile sector. In the 2000s we expanded into the glass washing and packaging sectors. Today, with a team of 42, we deliver custom and standard solutions to domestic and export customers across three sectors.

items.title: Engineering discipline
items.description: Every project is delivered with measurable tolerances.

items.title: Long-term partnership
items.description: We've worked with most of our customers for 10+ years.

items.title: Transparent process
items.description: Clear communication at every stage, from feasibility to delivery.

hero.title: Get in touch with us
hero.subtitle: Share your brief and we'll come back with a feasibility within 48 hours.

details.title: Contact details

form.title: Send us a message
form.subtitle: Fill in the form; when you press send, your default email app opens with your message ready to go.
form.messagePlaceholder: Briefly describe your project or question...
form.submitted: Your email app is opening. Please review and send.
form.fallbackNotice: If your email app didn't open, you can write directly to {email}.
form.minMessage: Your message must be at least 10 characters.

whatsapp.title: Message on WhatsApp
whatsapp.description: Send your questions directly via WhatsApp and get a fast reply.
whatsapp.prefill: Hello, I'd like to get in touch with Kıta Plastik.

telegram.title: Message on Telegram
